response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (not listed), deep embedded C/Linux-kernel work, and networking security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chips) — none of which appear in the resume. Brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (2007-2008) and a C++ bachelor thesis are too dated and shallow for a mid-senior embedded security role.
strengths: Long track record (20+ years) as a versatile software engineer across multiple stacks
Some historical C/C++ and Linux exposure (National Instruments, wave field synthesis thesis)
Strong testing/TDD discipline and ability to learn new technologies quickly
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed — hard requirement is native-level
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, MACsec, 802.1X, or chip-vendor SDK experience
No evidence of recent C programming or Linux kernel source modification work
